<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create Api Key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/keys"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates an API key for a user.

Args:
    request (Request): The request object containing the user ID in the request state.

Returns:
    str: The created API key.

</ParamsDetails>
